results.explanation: The snippet contains both a full name (Sara Hoffmann) and an employee identifier (E-20491), which are considered personal data under GDPR. Employee identifiers combined with names in business documents typically require human review to ensure proper handling.
The snippet contains a generic supplier email address (procurement@nordic-components.example) that does not identify a natural person, thus it is not personal data under GDPR.

The snippet contains a signature with a full name (J. Keller), which is personal data under GDPR. As it appears in an access approval document, it is not a generic business contact but a specific individual's authorization, warranting human review to ensure proper handling and compliance.

The snippet mentions that a document containing personal data was mistakenly shared with an external vendor, which indicates a potential data breach incident. This requires immediate attention and escalation for further investigation and mitigation.
results.original_snippet: Description: A document containing personal data was mistakenly shared with the external vendor.
